projectDescription: An open-source implementation of AlphaFold v2, DeepMind's deep learning system for highly accurate protein structure prediction from amino acid sequences.
keyFeatures: Highly accurate protein structure prediction from amino acid sequences
Multiple model presets (monomer, monomer_ptm, monomer_casp14, multimer)
Per-residue confidence scoring (pLDDT) and predicted aligned error (PAE)
Amber relaxation post-processing for improved local geometry
Multiple sequence alignment (MSA) pipeline using HHblits, JackHMMER, and HHsearch
Support for bulk inference via precomputed MSAs
publicApiSurface: run_alphafold.main() — top-level entry point for structure prediction
RunModel (alphafold.model.model) — container for the JAX model with predict()
DataPipeline (alphafold.data.pipeline) — builds input features for monomer prediction
DataPipelineMultimer (alphafold.data.pipeline_multimer) — builds input features for multimer prediction
AmberRelaxation (alphafold.relax.relax) — post-processing with Amber force field
predicted_tm_score() (alphafold.common.confidence) — computes pTM and ipTM scores
MODEL_PRESETS (alphafold.model.config) — available model presets: monomer, monomer_ptm, monomer_casp14, multimer
from_prediction() (alphafold.common.protein) — creates Protein from model output
to_pdb() (alphafold.common.protein) — converts Protein to PDB format string
